summary: Aviation Hull insurance covering physical loss or damage to aircraft. Written on AVN 1C or equivalent Lloyd's Aviation policy wording. Complex fleet scheduling, airworthiness requirements, and agreed value structures.

schemaEntities.description: Aircraft entity. Custom: ICAO_Registration, AircraftType, MTOW_KG, EngineType, EngineCount, YearOfManufacture, AirworthinessCategory, CofA_Expiry, MaintenanceProgramme, LeaseFlag, LessorName, OperatingBases, FlightHoursPA.
94 rules: Certificate of Airworthiness expiry check, MTOW-based hull valuation adequacy, lessors interest validation, war risk area fleet scheduling, age-related exclusions.
Fleet scheduling entity. Custom: FleetRef, ScheduleBasis, AutoAddThreshold, TemporaryReplacementFlag, FleetAgreedValue, MaxSingleAircraft, FleetCompositionRestriction.

relationships.note: Agreed hull value and deductibles driven by 13 aircraft custom fields
Fleet entity has no GW Cloud equivalent -- no direct aviation fleet scheduling support
CofA expiry and MTOW rules are hard underwriting stops

migrationIssues.detail: Aircraft_AVH has 13 custom fields with no standard GW Cloud aviation entity. New aircraft entity design required.
FleetSchedule_AVH has no GW Cloud equivalent. Aviation fleet with auto-add provisions requires new GW Cloud entity design.
Certificate of Airworthiness expiry triggers policy cancellation. GW Cloud document expiry tracking needs custom integration with CAA registry.
Finance lease and operating lease lessor interest endorsements. GW Cloud additional insured support available -- complex lessor interest logic needs migration.

cloudMapping.action: ICAO registry integration required for aircraft validation -- new entity design
CAA G-INFO registry API integration for airworthiness certificate tracking
Aviation fleet scheduling entity -- 3-4 sprint design effort
Generic finance arrangement field -- lessor interest endorsement logic migration required
